## Meta and ABC launch joint workforce training program for data center construction

Investing in construction workforce training is a leading indicator of durable, multi-year capex commitment — META is signaling that AI infrastructure timelines are labor-constrained and worth structural remediation, reinforcing the long-duration hyperscaler spend thesis.

- Meta is co-launching a training initiative with ABC targeting the data center construction labor force.
- The program signals sustained hyperscaler capex commitment by investing in the construction labor supply chain itself.
- Addressing workforce constraints is a second-order enabler of data center capacity expansion timelines.
- The initiative reflects that AI infrastructure buildout is facing human capital bottlenecks, not just silicon or power ones.
